---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for FanOps Unified
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what the feature request is.

## Problem Statement / Rationale
Why is this feature needed? What pain point or World Cup stadium operations workflow does it solve?

## Suggested Implementation
Describe the solution or visual layouts you'd like to see implemented. Include any specific TanStack Start routes, store states, or third-party integrations needed.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, designs, wireframes, or reference examples about the feature request here.
